prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-DIARYSET-ENCANTO-713292EN Product Type: BLANK_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Encanto Journal Diary with Lock Keys Pom Pom Pen Girls Ages 3 and Up Description: This adorable hardcover Disney Encanto journal locking diary journal features vibrant colors and some of your little one's favorite members of the gifted family, The Madrigals, like Mirabel, Luisa, and Antonio. The easy-to-use secret journal is perfect for keeping any young child's secrets, memories, daily journals, drawings, and doodles safe under lock and key. Along with the 60-sheet diary, lock, and two keys, this diary also comes with a pink pom-pom writing pen, making it a complete diary set. Your budding artist or little poet can discover their own gifts through art and writing while being sure no brother or sister sibling will catch a glimpse of his or her creative work with this Encanto diary.

The Disney Encanto diary for girls is lightweight and great for travel. One of the best parts about the hardcover journal is that little ones can immediately document family memories while on the go, helping to boost writing and communication skills. Are you traveling to a Disney Park in the near future? Kids can easily take this lightweight travel journal with them to collect autographs and signatures from all their favorite Disney characters on their next Disneyland or DisneyWorld adventure, making the diary a treasured keepsake for years to come.

A great educational learning tool to encourage toddlers and kids to write, doodle, draw and be creative, but with privacy, if they are not ready to share their ideas with the world. This Encanto locking notebook is an ideal gift for any child to pass the time and practice drawing, writing down their thoughts or a favorite song, journaling, and more; the Encanto diary with lock makes a perfect stocking stuffer, Christmas gift, birthday gift, or party favor. Search Terms: Toys for girls birthday present Hanukkah sister Christmas gift preschool learning activities stocking stuffers diary with lock for girls Disney Encanto Disneyworld trip essentials Disneyland accessories for trip toddler travel toys journals Features: - DIARY FOR GIRLS: Disney Encanto 60 sheet locking hardcover journal diary with pom-pom pen is a safe spot little girls can keep their secrets, memories, drawings, and doodles and practice writing too; The diary features favorite characters from Encanto like Mirabel, Luisa, Isabella, and Antonio and comes with a lock and two keys - TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Little Disney Encanto fans can easily take all their thoughts on the go! This lightweight travel journal is also ideal for trips to Disneyland or Disneyworld to collect autographs and signatures from all their favorite Disney characters! - DIARY WITH LOCK: Your budding artist or little poet can be assured no brother or sister sibling will catch a glimpse of his or her colorings, drawings, notes, or secrets with the included lock and two silver keys - STOCKING STUFFERS: This Encanto locking notebook is an ideal gift for girls to pass the time and practice drawing, writing down their thoughts or a favorite song, journaling, doodling, and more; the vibrant Encanto secret diary makes a perfect stocking stuffer, birthday or Christmas gift or party favor - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 6.75 x .75 x 10.5 inches; Weight: .4lbs; Color: Multi; Ages: 3+ === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}
